title: capsicum villosum
intro: Capsicum villosum, also known as the hairy pepper, is a plant species within the Capsicum genus that belongs to the nightshade family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Capsicum villosum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Capsicum villosum can be found in the form of dried leaves, which are often used to make teas or infusions that can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
